text: South African President Ramaphosa: Many other countries now see that real genocide is happening in Gaza as well as on the West Bank.
text_zh: 南非总统拉马福萨：许多其他国家现在也看到，加沙以及西岸正在发生真正的种族灭绝。

text: 🇺🇦 ⚡️ The gunman barricaded himself inside a Velmart supermarket, taking hostages. KORD special forces stormed the building, killed the gunman, and rescued the hostages. Ten people remain hospitalized. The attacker was reportedly a 58-year-old man originally from Moscow; he allegedly used automatic weapons, had earlier set fire to an apartment, and the motive remains unclear as investigations continue. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇺🇦 ⚡️ 枪手把自己关在一家Velmart超市里，劫持了人质。KORD特种部队突袭了该建筑，击毙了枪手，并解救了人质。十人仍在住院治疗。据报道，袭击者是一名58岁的男子，原籍莫斯科；他据称使用了自动武器，早些时候曾放火烧毁了一间公寓，目前调查仍在继续，动机尚不清楚。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: Brazilian President Lula: No president of a republic of one country can interfere in another country’s election, ask for votes for another. Where is electoral sovereignty? Where is territorial sovereignty?
text_zh: 巴西总统卢拉：任何一个国家的共和国总统都不能干涉另一个国家的选举，不能为他人拉票。选举主权在哪里？领土主权在哪里？

text: 🇺🇦 ⚡️ Multiple casualties 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇺🇦 ⚡️ 多人伤亡 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇺🇦 ⚡️ A shooting incident occurred today in Kyiv's Holosiivskyi district. A gunman opened fire, killing at least five people and injuring around 10 others (including a child, per some reports). 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇺🇦 ⚡️ 基辅戈洛谢耶夫区今天发生了一起枪击事件。一名枪手开火，造成至少五人死亡，约十人受伤（据部分报道称其中包括一名儿童）。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 ⚡️ India Expresses Deep Concern to Iran Over Firing on Merchant Ships in Strait of Hormuz; Urges Resumption of Safe Passage 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 ⚡️ 印度就霍尔木兹海峡商船遭射击一事向伊朗表达深切关注；敦促恢复安全通行。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇦 The Attorney General confirmed that four people were killed on the street and one inside the supermarket by the Kiev shooter. According to Ukrainian media, the shooter has been identified as Dmitry Vasilchenkov, born in 1968 in Moscow, holding Ukrainian…" 🇺🇦 Photo of the neutralised Kiev shooter who killed five people. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇦 总检察长证实，基辅枪手在街头杀害了四人，在超市内杀害了一人。据乌克兰媒体报道，枪手已被确认为德米特里·瓦西连科夫（Dmitry Vasilchenkov），1968年出生于莫斯科，持有乌克兰……” 🇺🇦 击毙五人的基辅枪手照片。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Nuno Felix Tough luck The United States opposes any efforts to incorporate European preference in the EU Defense Procurement Directive. We fully support European rearmament and a revitalization of the European defense industrial base. However, European preference in the Directive would undermine member state flexibility to make national procurement purchases, hinder European rearmament efforts, create barriers for Allies reaching NATO capability targets, and run counter to European commitments in the 2025 U.S.-EU Joint Statement on trade and Reciprocal Defense Procurement Agreements. Our full statement here: https://ec.europa.eu/info/law/better-regulation/have-your-say/initiatives/15753-Defence-simplifying-EU-rules-for-defence-and-sensitive-security-procurement/F33372886_en - Ambassador Andrew Puzder tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 真倒霉 美国反对任何将欧洲优先原则纳入欧盟国防采购指令的努力。我们全力支持欧洲重新武装和振兴欧洲国防工业基础。然而，指令中的欧洲优先原则将削弱成员国进行国家采购的灵活性，阻碍欧洲的重新武装努力，为盟国实现北约能力目标制造障碍，并违背欧洲在2025年美欧关于贸易和互惠国防采购协议的联合声明中的承诺。我们的完整声明见此：https://ec.europa.eu/info/law/better-regulation/have-your-say/initiatives/15753-Defence-simplifying-EU-rules-for-defence-and-sensitive-security-procurement/F33372886_en - 安德鲁·普兹德大使推文

text: Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 It seems that we will definitely see a second round of military strikes on Iran. 🚀 🔥 Reuters reports that Iran is sending the following maritime message: "Attention all ships! Due to the US government's failure to fulfill its obligations in the negotiations, Iran declares the Strait of Hormuz fully closed again. Passage of any type of ship or state-owned company vessel through the Strait of Hormuz is prohibited." See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 看来我们肯定会看到针对伊朗的第二轮军事打击。🚀 🔥 路透社报道称，伊朗正在发送以下海上信息：“请所有船只注意！由于美国政府未能履行谈判中的义务，伊朗宣布霍尔木兹海峡再次完全关闭。禁止任何类型的船只或国有公司船只通过霍尔木兹海峡。” 与我们一起查看最新动态：@visionergeo 推文

text: At least five people have been killed after a gunman opened fire in Kyiv’s Holosiivskyi district. Mayor Vitali Klitschko said around 10 people, including a child, were hospitalized. The attacker took hostages in a supermarket, fired at police, and was later killed.
text_zh: 基辅戈洛谢耶夫区发生枪击事件，造成至少五人死亡。市长维塔利·克利奇科表示，约有10人（包括一名儿童）被送往医院。袭击者在一家超市劫持了人质，向警察开火，随后被击毙。

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇦It is reported that the man who shot people in Kiev had been forcibly mobilized a few days ago, and today he escaped from the military unit 🔴@DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇺🇦 The Attorney General confirmed that four people were killed on the street and one inside the supermarket by the Kiev shooter. According to Ukrainian media, the shooter has been identified as Dmitry Vasilchenkov, born in 1968 in Moscow, holding Ukrainian citizenship. According to media reports, he previously lived in Bakhmut, Donetsk region, before relocating to the Goloseyevsky district of Kiev. Ukraine's Attorney General confirmed the Kiev shooter was 58 years old and born in Moscow, but declined to comment on media reports that he held Ukrainian citizenship. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇦 据报道，在基辅开枪射击的人几天前被强制动员，今天从部队逃跑了 🔴@DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐款 | 广告” 🇺🇦 总检察长证实，基辅枪手在街头杀害了四人，在超市内杀害了一人。据乌克兰媒体报道，枪手已被确认为德米特里·瓦西连科夫（Dmitry Vasilchenkov），1968年出生于莫斯科，持有乌克兰国籍。据媒体报道，他此前住在顿涅茨克地区的巴赫穆特，后来搬到了基辅的戈洛谢耶夫区。乌克兰总检察长证实基辅枪手现年58岁，出生于莫斯科，但拒绝就有关他持有乌克兰国籍的媒体报道发表评论。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇦Two killed, 10 injured after a gunman opened fire on residents of Kyiv then quickly barricading himself on a shop in the city’s Holosiivskyi district. The gunmen was neutralized in the shop after taking hostages. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇦 Ukrainian President Zelenskyy reports that five people have been confirmed killed from the attack so far. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇦一名枪手在基辅向居民开火，随后迅速躲进该市霍洛西伊夫区的一家商店并设置路障，造成2人死亡，10人受伤。枪手在劫持人质后在店内被击毙。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇦 乌克兰总统泽连斯基报告称，目前已确认有五人在袭击中丧生。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 Two killed, 10 injured after a gunman opened fire on residents of Kyiv then quickly barricading himself on a shop in the city’s Holosiivskyi district. The gunmen was neutralized in the shop after taking hostages. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 一名枪手在基辅向居民开火，随后迅速躲进该市霍洛西伊夫区的一家商店并设置路障，造成2人死亡，10人受伤。枪手在劫持人质后在店内被击毙。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to Israel Defense Forces: "IDF: The IDF eliminated a terrorist cell operating in proximity to IDF soldiers in southern Lebanon, in the area of the forward defense line dedicated to preventing imminent threats to Israel’s northern communities"
text_zh: ↩️ 回复以色列国防军：“以军：以色列国防军在黎巴嫩南部消灭了一个在以军附近活动的恐怖分子小组，该区域位于旨在防止对以色列北部社区造成迫在眉睫威胁的前沿防御线内。”

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇦The man who carried out the shooting in Kiev was eliminated by law enforcement officers. According to Ukrainian media, the suspect's name is Dmitry Vasilchenkov, born on April 21, 1968. He was born in Moscow and holds Ukrainian citizenship. He previously…" 🇺🇦 It is reported that the man who shot people in Kiev had been forcibly mobilized a few days ago, and today he escaped from the military unit 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇦在基辅实施枪击的男子已被执法人员击毙。据乌克兰媒体报道，嫌疑人名为德米特里·瓦西尔琴科夫（Dmitry Vasilchenkov），1968年4月21日出生。他出生于莫斯科，拥有乌克兰国籍。他此前……” 🇺🇦 据报道，在基辅枪击路人的男子几天前被强制动员，今天从军事单位逃跑了 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Nuno Felix RT @michaeldweiss : Well, looky here. Veronika Loginova, the woman in charge of Russia's anti-doping agency is the common-law wife of Dmitry Kovalev, an FSB colonel who not only works for Russia's doping program but also belongs to the same FSB directorate that that poisoned Alexey Navalny with Novichok in 2020. I suppose you can make this up, but it'd be a hard sell in any Hollywood writers' room. https://theins.press/en/inv/291614 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @michaeldweiss：好吧，看看这个。负责俄罗斯反兴奋剂机构的维罗妮卡·洛吉诺娃（Veronika Loginova）是德米特里·科瓦廖夫（Dmitry Kovalev）的同居妻子，后者是一名FSB上校，不仅为俄罗斯的兴奋剂计划工作，还隶属于2020年用诺维乔克毒害阿列克谢·纳瓦利内（Alexey Navalny）的同一个FSB局。我想你可以编造这个故事，但在任何好莱坞编剧室里都很难让人信服。https://theins.press/en/inv/291614 推文

text: WarTranslated A gunman opened fire in Kyiv's Holosiivskyi district, killing at least two and wounding several including a child. He is now barricaded in a supermarket with hostages. KORD special forces on site, negotiations underway, Klitschko said. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045518721855197315/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 一名枪手在基辅的霍洛西伊夫区（Holosiivskyi district）开火，造成至少两人死亡，多人受伤，其中包括一名儿童。据克利奇科（Klitschko）称，他目前带着人质在一家超市内负隅顽抗。KORD特种部队已抵达现场，谈判正在进行中。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045518721855197315/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 The Israeli military said it carried out several strikes in southern Lebanon against alleged Hezbollah members who allegedly violated the "ceasefire understandings." Troops operating south of the “Yellow Line” identified alleged fighters who approached…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Israeli military said it killed several alleged Hezbollah members who violated the ceasefire understandings and posed an immediate threat to troops in southern Lebanon today. The IAF targeted an armed group that approached Israeli forces south of the forward yellow line. In a separate incident, the IDF said it targeted a Hezbollah tunnel shaft after identifying militants entering it. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列军方表示，在黎巴嫩南部对据称违反‘停火谅解’的真主党成员进行了多次打击。在‘黄线’以南行动的部队发现了据称接近的武装人员……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列军方表示，今天在黎巴嫩南部击毙了几名违反停火谅解并对部队构成直接威胁的真主党成员。以色列空军瞄准了一个接近以色列军队的前沿黄线以南的武装小组。在另一起事件中，以军称在发现武装分子进入真主党隧道竖井后对其进行了打击。@wfwitness

text: Visioner 🇺🇦 🙏 Horrible things are happening in Kyiv at this very moment. The police special forces of KORD are preparing to storm the Velmart supermarket in the Holosiivskyi district, where an armed terrorist is entrenched and has already managed to kill up to 5 people. No other information is available at this time. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇦 🙏 此刻基辅正在发生可怕的事情。KORD警察特种部队正准备突袭位于霍洛西伊夫区的Velmart超市，一名武装恐怖分子正盘踞在那里，并已杀害了多达5人。目前没有其他信息。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Michael A. Horowitz RT @CEMA_FR : Aujourd'hui, le sergent-chef Florian Montorio est mort pour la France dans le cadre de l'opération DAMAN, engagement français au sein de la Force intérimaire des Nations-Unies au Liban. Pris à partie par des tirs, avec sa patrouille au cours d'une mission d'ouverture d'itinéraire pour ravitailler un poste isolé de casques bleus, et malgré la prise en charge immédiate par ses camarades et les équipes médicales spécialisées, il n'a pas pu être sauvé. Au nom des armées françaises, j’adresse mes condoléances à sa famille, ses proches et ses frères d'armes du @17eRGP . J’ai également une pensée pour ses camarades blessés au cours de cette action qui ont fait preuve d'une grande bravoure. Le Sergent-chef Florian Montorio du 17eme régiment du génie parachutiste de Montauban est tombé ce matin au sud-Liban lors d’une attaque contre la FINUL. Trois de ses frères d’armes sont blessés et ont été évacués. La Nation s’incline avec respect et adresse son soutien aux familles de nos soldats et à tous nos militaires engagés pour la paix au Liban. Tout laisse à penser que la responsabilité de cette attaque incombe au Hezbollah. La France exige des autorités libanaises qu’elles arrêtent immédiatement les coupables et prennent leurs responsabilités aux côtés de la FINUL. - Emmanuel Macron tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复OSINT Michael A. Horowitz 转发 @CEMA_FR：今天，一级准尉弗洛里安·蒙托里奥（Florian Montorio）在法国参与联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队（联黎部队）的DAMAN行动中为国捐躯。在执行为孤立的维和人员哨所补给的路线开辟任务时，他与巡逻队遭到火力袭击，尽管他的战友和专业医疗队进行了紧急救治，但他仍未能获救。我谨代表法国军队，向他的家人、亲友和 @17eRGP 的战友们表示哀悼。我也挂念在这次行动中受伤的战友们，他们表现出了极大的英勇。来自蒙托邦第17伞兵工兵团的一级准尉弗洛里安·蒙托里奥今晨在黎巴嫩南部针对联黎部队的袭击中牺牲。他的三名战友受伤并已被撤离。国家怀着敬意低头致哀，并向我们士兵的家属以及所有为黎巴嫩和平而战的军人表示支持。一切迹象表明，真主党应对此次袭击负责。法国要求黎巴嫩当局立即逮捕罪犯，并与联黎部队并肩承担责任。- 埃马纽埃尔·马克龙 推文

text: Iran Blocks Strait of Hormuz Again Over U.S. Blockade Iran closed the strait again & fired on ships after a brief reopening, citing the U.S. blockade. Iran's Deputy FM Saeed Khatibzadeh expressed frustration, saying "Trump talks too much,” contradicts himself & is hard to understand what he wants. READ MORE
text_zh: 伊朗因美国封锁再次封锁霍尔木兹海峡 伊朗在短暂重新开放后再次关闭海峡并向船只开火，理由是美国的封锁。伊朗副外长赛义德·哈提布扎德（Saeed Khatibzadeh）表示沮丧，称“特朗普说得太多”，自相矛盾，很难理解他想要什么。阅读更多

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Footage on Lebanese social media has surfaced showcasing a man burning a picture of Former Hezbollah secretary General Hassan Nasrallah in Yohomor, Bekaa. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 黎巴嫩社交媒体上出现了画面，展示了一名男子在贝卡谷地的尤霍莫尔（Yohomor）焚烧前真主党秘书长哈桑·纳斯鲁拉（Hassan Nasrallah）的照片。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇮🇶🇮🇷 The U.S. State Department is offering a reward of up to $10 million for information on Ahmad al‑Hamidawi, the leader of Kata’ib Hezbollah. The Iranian‑backed group is responsible for alleged attacks on U.S. diplomatic facilities in Iraq, the alleged…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 Kata'ib Hezbollah has dismissed a U.S. reward of up to $10 million for information on its leader, Abu Hussein al‑Hamidawi. The group said the offer exposes Washington’s failure and weakness, and that its commander is not afraid of "martyrdom." “We are students of a school that knows no defeat and accepts no surrender,” the statement read. It also praised the resilience of Iran and Lebanon during the 40‑day war and vowed to continue the path of resistance. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇮🇶🇮🇷 美国国务院悬赏最高1000万美元征集有关真主党旅（Kata’ib Hezbollah）领导人艾哈迈德·哈米达维（Ahmad al‑Hamidawi）的信息。该伊朗支持的组织应对据称对美国驻伊拉克外交设施的袭击负责……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 真主党旅驳斥了美国悬赏最高1000万美元征集其领导人阿布·侯赛因·哈米达维（Abu Hussein al‑Hamidawi）信息的做法。该组织表示，这一提议暴露了华盛顿的失败和软弱，其指挥官并不惧怕“殉难”。声明写道：“我们是深知失败且不接受投降的学校的学生。”声明还赞扬了伊朗和黎巴嫩在40天战争期间的韧性，并誓言继续抵抗之路。@wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Press TV: 🔴 Statement of the Secretariat of the Supreme National Security Council: 🔺 Following the defeat of the invading enemies on the military battlefield thanks to the historic and unparalleled resistance of the Iranian people and armed forces, messages and requests from the Americans for a ceasefire and negotiations to end the war they started began on the 10th day of the war. 🔺 On the 40th day of the war, after the official announcement by the US President accepting Iran's 10-point plan as the framework for ending the war, the Islamic Republic of Iran agreed to hold negotiations in Islamabad, with Pakistan acting as mediator. 🔺 The negotiations lasted 21 hours non-stop. The Iranian delegation seriously pursued the demands of the Iranian people with initiative, despite deep mistrust of the US. 🔺 Although the enemy had agreed to operate within Iran's 10-point plan before the talks, during negotiations they raised new and excessive demands. They faced the Iranian delegation's firm stance and realized Iran would not retreat, backed by its combatants, national pride, and vigilant people. This round ended without concrete results, to be resumed when the enemy abandons its excesses and aligns its demands with battlefield realities. 🔺 Recently, with the Pakistani army commander in Tehran as mediator, new proposals have been put forward by the Americans. The Islamic Republic of Iran is reviewing them and has not yet responded. 🔺 The Iranian negotiating team, relying on Almighty God, public support, steel resolve, and the firepower of its combatants, will not compromise, retreat, or show negligence by a single iota. They will defend Iran's interests and the precious blood shed in this war—especially that of the dear Leader—for independence, dignity, and honor. 🔺 One of Iran's essential preconditions for accepting a temporary ceasefire was a halt to fire on all fronts, including Lebanon. The Zionist enemy violated this from the start with brutal attacks on Lebanon and heroic Hezbollah. 🔺 Due to Iran's insistence, the Zionist regime agreed to a ceasefire in Lebanon. It was stipulated that if the enemy observes a ceasefire on all fronts, the Strait of Hormuz would be conditionally opened temporarily until the end of the ceasefire, solely for commercial vessels (not military or hostile nations' non-military vessels), under the control and permission of Iran's armed forces and via routes designated by Iran. 🔺 Since most of the equipment for US military bases in the Persian Gulf is supplied via shipping through the Strait of Hormuz, which threatens Iran's national security and the Persian Gulf region, Iran is determined to monitor and control traffic through the Strait until the war fully ends and lasting peace is achieved. 🔺 This control will be implemented by obtaining full information on passing vessels, issuing transit permits according to Iran's announced rules (commensurate with war conditions), collecting fees for security, safety, and environmental protection services, and using routes announced by Iran. 🔺 As long as the enemy intends to disrupt vessel traffic or impose methods like naval blockades, the Islamic Republic of Iran will consider that a ceasefire violation and prevent the conditional, limited opening of the Strait of Hormuz. 🔺 The Secretariat of the Supreme National Security Council, recalling the recommendations of the Leader, emphasizes that to fully consolidate military gains and succeed in diplomacy, the continued presence of the brave Iranian people in the streets, full vigilance on all fronts, and protection of national unity by officials, media, and political/social activists remain essential. @PressTV
text_zh: 🔄 转发自Press TV：🔴 最高国家安全委员会秘书处声明：🔺 在伊朗人民和武装部队历史性且无与伦比的抵抗下，入侵敌人在军事战场上惨败，战争第10天起，美国人就开始发送停火和谈判请求，以结束他们发起的战争。🔺 战争第40天，在美国总统正式宣布接受伊朗的10点计划作为结束战争的框架后，伊朗伊斯兰共和国同意在巴基斯坦斡旋下在伊斯兰堡举行谈判。🔺 谈判持续了21小时不间断。尽管对美国深感不信任，伊朗代表团仍主动积极地追求伊朗人民的诉求。🔺 尽管敌人在会谈前已同意在伊朗10点计划框架内运作，但在谈判中他们提出了新的过分要求。他们面对的是伊朗代表团坚定的立场，并意识到在战斗人员、民族自豪感和警惕的人民支持下，伊朗不会退缩。这一轮谈判在没有具体结果的情况下结束，待敌人放弃过分要求并使其诉求与战场现实相符时再恢复。🔺 最近，随着巴基斯坦陆军司令在德黑兰进行斡旋，美国人提出了新的建议。伊朗伊斯兰共和国正在审查这些建议，尚未作出回应。🔺 伊朗谈判小组依靠全能的真主、公众的支持、钢铁般的意志和战斗人员的火力，绝不会妥协、退缩或表现出丝毫疏忽。他们将捍卫伊朗的利益以及在这场战争中流下的宝贵鲜血——特别是亲爱的领袖的鲜血——以维护独立、尊严和荣誉。🔺 伊朗接受临时停火的基本先决条件之一是所有战线停火，包括黎巴嫩。犹太复国主义敌人从一开始就通过对黎巴嫩和英勇的真主党进行残酷袭击违反了这一点。🔺 由于伊朗的坚持，犹太复国主义政权同意在黎巴嫩停火。规定如果敌人在所有战线遵守停火，霍尔木兹海峡将在停火结束前有条件地临时开放，仅限商业船只（非军事或敌对国家的非军事船只），在伊朗武装部队的控制和许可下，并经由伊朗指定的航线通行。🔺 由于波斯湾美军基地的大部分装备是通过霍尔木兹海峡的航运供应的，这威胁到伊朗的国家安全和波斯湾地区，伊朗决心在战争完全结束并实现持久和平之前，监测和控制通过海峡的交通。🔺 这种控制将通过获取过往船只的完整信息、根据伊朗公布的规则（与战争条件相适应）签发过境许可证、收取安全、安保和环境保护服务费以及使用伊朗公布的航线来实施。🔺 只要敌人打算扰乱船只交通或实施海军封锁等手段，伊朗伊斯兰共和国将视其为违反停火协议，并阻止霍尔木兹海峡的有条件、有限开放。🔺 最高国家安全委员会秘书处回顾领袖的建议，强调为了全面巩固军事成果并在外交上取得成功，勇敢的伊朗人民继续走上街头、在所有战线上保持高度警惕以及官员、媒体和政治/社会活动家维护民族团结仍然至关重要。@PressTV

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Following Hezbollah’s announcement many southerners have started leaving the south once again. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Footage showcasing southerns heading back to Beirut, Mount Lebanon and the North following Hezbollah’s Deputy statement. @wfwitness

text: NEW: In the coming days, the U.S. military plans to board Iran-linked oil tankers and seize ships in international waters. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 最新消息：未来几天，美军计划登上与伊朗有关的油轮并在国际水域扣押船只。来源：华尔街日报

text: 🇺🇦 The man who carried out the shooting in Kiev was eliminated by law enforcement officers. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 在基辅实施枪击的男子已被执法人员击毙。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ : The U.S. military is preparing to board Iran‑linked oil tankers and seize commercial ships in international waters, expanding its naval crackdown beyond the Middle East. The move will target “dark fleet” vessels carrying Iranian oil or arms, including those already outside the Persian Gulf. The announcement came as Iran declared the Strait of Hormuz completely closed and attacked several commercial vessels on Saturday. Iran also warned that no vessel of any type or nationality is permitted to transit the strait. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 华尔街日报：美军正准备登上与伊朗有关的油轮并在国际水域扣押商船，将其海军打击范围扩大到中东以外。此举将针对运载伊朗石油或武器的“暗影船队”船只，包括那些已经在波斯湾以外的船只。此前，伊朗宣布霍尔木兹海峡完全关闭，并于周六袭击了几艘商船。伊朗还警告称，不允许任何类型或国籍的船只通过该海峡。@wfwitness

text_zh: 🇺🇦 有报道称枪手点燃了他的公寓 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Following claims by Hezbollah of ceasefire violations by the IDF, Hezbollah Deputy Mahmoud Qamati spoke from Dahieh: “This is a temporary ceasefire, do not return or settle in Dahieh or the south the enemy always stabs in the back take a breath…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Following Hezbollah’s announcement many southerners have started leaving the south once again. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 在真主党声称以军违反停火协议后，真主党副秘书长马哈茂德·卡马蒂（Mahmoud Qamati）在达希耶（Dahieh）发表讲话：‘这是临时停火，不要返回或在达希耶或南部定居，敌人总是背后捅刀子，喘口气……’” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 在真主党发表声明后，许多南方人再次开始离开南部。@wfwitness

text_zh: 🇺🇦 警方正通过扩音器与躲在超市里的武装男子进行沟通。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 i24NEWS: Iran has announced the complete closure of the Strait of Hormuz. “Attention all vessels. Regarding the failure of the US government to fulfil its commitment in the negotiations, Iran announces the complete closure of the Strait of Hormuz. No vessel of any type or nationality is permitted to transit the Strait of Hormuz.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 i24NEWS：伊朗宣布完全关闭霍尔木兹海峡。“请所有船只注意。关于美国政府未能履行谈判承诺，伊朗宣布完全关闭霍尔木兹海峡。不允许任何类型或国籍的船只通过霍尔木兹海峡。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 An advisor to the IRGC commander, Sardar Naqdi, said Iran has many targets it has not yet struck that could change the outcome of the war. “We have the upper hand. We can stop production of over 15 million barrels of oil per day and shut it down for a year, but we did not want to cause too much disruption in the world,” he said. He added that Iran has not yet targeted the enemy’s information technology, artificial intelligence and oil production capabilities. “Their hands are under our axe. They say they will hit our power plants – if they hit our power plants, we will hit theirs.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队指挥官顾问纳格迪（Sardar Naqdi）表示，伊朗还有许多尚未打击的目标，这些目标可能会改变战争的结果。“我们占据上风。我们可以停止每天超过1500万桶石油的生产并将其关闭一年，但我们不想给世界造成太大的破坏，”他说。他补充说，伊朗尚未针对敌人的信息技术、人工智能和石油生产能力。“他们的手在我们的斧头下。他们说要打击我们的发电厂——如果他们打击我们的发电厂，我们就会打击他们的。” @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇦 Shots are being heard in the supermarket where the terrorist is holding hostages - Kiev mayor Klitschko According to media reports, an unknown individual barricaded himself in the supermarket after carrying out a chaotic shooting on the street. The operation to arrest the shooter is ongoing, 2 people have died, and five are injured - Klitschko 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 基辅市长克利奇科称，在恐怖分子扣押人质的超市里听到了枪声。据媒体报道，一名身份不明的人在街头进行混乱的枪击后躲进了超市。逮捕枪手的行动正在进行中，2人死亡，5人受伤 - 克利奇科 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇷🇮🇱 Hezbollah political deputy Mahmoud Qamati thanked Iran for imposing the ceasefire through “international pressure” and criticised Lebanese President Joseph Aoun for thanking “the killer and criminal” Trump instead of Iran. He accused the Lebanese…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Following the ceasefire violations by the IDF Hezbollah political deputy Mahmoud Qamati from Dahieh: “This is a temporary ceasefire, do not return or settle in Dahieh or the south the enemy always stabs in the back take a breath but stay on alert.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇷🇮🇱 真主党政治副手马哈茂德·卡马蒂感谢伊朗通过‘国际压力’强加停火，并批评黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）感谢‘杀手和罪犯’特朗普而不是伊朗。他指责黎巴嫩……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 在以军违反停火协议后，真主党政治副手马哈茂德·卡马蒂在达希耶表示：“这是临时停火，不要返回或在达希耶或南部定居，敌人总是背后捅刀子，喘口气但保持警惕。” @wfwitness

text: ELINT News RT @phildstewart : Reuters is reporting that Iran is broadcasting this VHF message: "Attention all ships, ​regarding the failure ⁠of the U.S. government to fulfil its commitment in the negotiation, Iran declares the Strait of Hormuz completely ​closed again. No vessel of any type or nationality ​is allowed ⁠to pass through the Strait of Hormuz.” tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转发 @phildstewart：路透社报道称，伊朗正在广播这条VHF信息：“请所有船只注意，关于美国政府未能履行谈判承诺，伊朗宣布霍尔木兹海峡再次完全关闭。不允许任何类型或国籍的船只通过霍尔木兹海峡。” 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Iranian radio message near Hormuz -Reuters: "Attention all ships, regarding the failure ⁠of the U.S. government to fulfil its commitment in the negotiation, Iran declares the Strait of Hormuz completely ​closed again. No vessel of any type or nationality ​is allowed ⁠to pass.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 路透社报道霍尔木兹附近的伊朗无线电信息：“请所有船只注意，关于美国政府未能履行谈判承诺，伊朗宣布霍尔木兹海峡再次完全关闭。不允许任何类型或国籍的船只通过。” 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Russian pro-war blogger Dmitry Steshin: 🗣️ “One side sends trucks full of soldiers to the front, the other — trucks full of FPV drones.” ▪️ According to him, Ukraine is rapidly expanding its capabilities and is effectively using a “wall of drones” tactic. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：🇺🇦 🇷🇺 俄罗斯亲战博主德米特里·斯捷申（Dmitry Steshin）：🗣️ “一方向前线运送满载士兵的卡车，另一方——运送满载FPV无人机的卡车。” ▪️ 据他称，乌克兰正在迅速扩大其能力，并有效地使用“无人机墙”战术。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench: "🇮🇷🇮🇳⚡️According to TankerTrackers.com, two Channel 16 (the international VHF marine radio) audio recordings captured today confirm that this two Indian-flagged vessels were forced back west out of the Strait of Hormuz by Iran's Sepah (IRGC) Navy, with firing…" 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 ⚡️ TankerTrackers.com has released an audio recording from the moment Iran's Sepah Navy (IRGC Navy) opened fire on Indian-flagged vessels in the Strait of Hormuz. "Sepah Navy! Motor Tanker Sanmar Herald! Sepah Navy! You gave me clearance to go! Sepah Navy! Sepah Navy! This is Motor Tanker Sanmar Herald! My name is second on your list! You gave me clearance to go! You're firing now — let me turn back!" 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: ↩️ 回复ResistanceTrench：“🇮🇷🇮🇳⚡️据TankerTrackers.com称，今天捕获的两段16频道（国际VHF海上无线电）音频记录证实，这两艘悬挂印度国旗的船只被伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军强行向西赶出霍尔木兹海峡，并伴有开火……” 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 ⚡️ TankerTrackers.com发布了一段音频记录，记录了伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军在霍尔木兹海峡向悬挂印度国旗的船只开火的瞬间。“革命卫队海军！机动油轮Sanmar Herald号！革命卫队海军！你给了我通行许可！革命卫队海军！革命卫队海军！这是机动油轮Sanmar Herald号！我的名字在你们名单上的第二位！你给了我通行许可！你们现在开火了——让我掉头！” 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ IRGC Major General Naqdi: It may be that if the war continues, it’ll become a world war.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队少将纳格迪：如果战争继续下去，它可能会演变成一场世界大战。

text: Cuba's President Miguel Díaz-Canel: If 32 Cuban combatants fell in Venezuela defending the president of that nation, what wouldn't millions of Cubans do, with that same example, fighting to save the Revolution and to defend Cuban soil?
text_zh: 古巴总统米格尔·迪亚斯-卡内尔（Miguel Díaz-Canel）：如果32名古巴战斗人员在委内瑞拉为保卫该国总统而牺牲，那么数百万古巴人又怎会不以同样的榜样，为拯救革命和保卫古巴领土而战呢？

text: 🇺🇦 There are reports and video coming out of Ukraine showing an active shooter with some dead and injured. @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 有来自乌克兰的报道和视频显示，一名活跃的枪手造成了一些人员伤亡。@DDGeopolitics

text: Pope Leo XIV: The talk that I gave at the prayer meeting for peace a couple of days ago was prepared two weeks ago, well before the president ever commented on myself and on the message of peace that I am promoting. And yet, as it happens, it was looked at as if I was trying to debate, again, the president, which is not my interest at all. Source: OSV News
text_zh: 教皇利奥十四世：我几天前在和平祈祷会上发表的讲话是两周前准备的，远在总统对我本人以及我所宣扬的和平信息发表评论之前。然而，正如所发生的那样，它被视为我试图再次与总统辩论，这根本不是我的兴趣所在。来源：OSV News

text: 🔄 Forwarded from China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong: *Join Danny Haiphong LIVE today April 18th 12noon eastern 6pm CET w/ Patrick Henningsen!* Danny and Patrick discuss the latest developments in the Iran war, including the IRGC shutting the door on the Strait of Hormuz in retaliation to ceasefire violations, US-Iran talks forthcoming, and much more in the war that is shaking the geopolitical landscape in root and branch. Watch here: https://www.youtube.com/live/Mketdh_C3fU?si=i3GfMCw4jim1Ua95
text_zh: 🔄 转发自China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong：*今天4月18日中午12点（东部时间）/下午6点（欧洲中部时间），Danny与Patrick Henningsen进行直播！* Danny和Patrick讨论了伊朗战争的最新进展，包括伊斯兰革命卫队因停火违规而关闭霍尔木兹海峡、即将举行的美伊会谈，以及这场正在从根本上撼动地缘政治格局的战争中的更多内容。在此观看：https://www.youtube.com/live/Mketdh_C3fU?si=i3GfMCw4jim1Ua95

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇳🇮🇷 India has summoned the Iranian ambassador after an Indian ship was attacked in the Strait of Hormuz today. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 TankerTrackers: An audio recording released today captures the crew of the tanker Sanmar Herald pleading with Iranian Sepah Navy forces after being given clearance to transit the Strait of Hormuz. “You gave me clearance to go! You are firing now! Let me turn back,” a crew member says. The vessel had been cleared to pass but came under fire. No casualties have been reported. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇳🇮🇷 在一艘印度船只今天在霍尔木兹海峡遭到袭击后，印度召见了伊朗大使。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 TankerTrackers：今天发布的一段音频记录捕捉到了油轮Sanmar Herald号的船员在获得通过霍尔木兹海峡的许可后，向伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军求情的画面。“你给了我通行许可！你们现在开火了！让我掉头，”一名船员说。该船已获准通过，但遭到开火。目前没有人员伤亡报告。@wfwitness

text: India Angry at Iran Over its Oil Tanker Hit in Hormuz Strait Indian-flagged oil tanker Sanmar Herald was attacked while crossing the strait. Crew are reportedly safe. The incident follows a brief reopening during which at least 8 vessels crossed, after a 50-day blockade. READ MORE
text_zh: 印度对伊朗袭击其在霍尔木兹海峡的油轮感到愤怒 悬挂印度国旗的油轮Sanmar Herald号在穿越海峡时遭到袭击。据报道船员安全。此次事件发生在一个短暂的重新开放期之后，在此期间至少有8艘船只在50天的封锁后通过。阅读更多
